title: Enable Activity Log pane in item view for Guest users

posts.author: Afreiling (Alexander Freiling)
posts.cookedHtml:
We create all our clients as guest users to ensure they do not have access to sensitive information on company-wide boards or the ability to change the board structure.

Previously, our clients had the ability to view the Activity Log pane in item view, but this functionality was recently removed.

I request either a resolution to this issue or the creation of an option that allows us to enable Activity Log access for guests.
